steps.t: Ranger Tadan and his fellow Dúnedain are hiding at the end of the causeway to Haudh Elendil, waiting in ambush for Mordrambor to emerge. Tadan needs y…
You have been asked to bring Mordrambor back to the end of the causeway with the Rangers.
Ranger Tadan is at the end of the causeway in front of Haudh Elendil. Tadan is waiting to speak with you, following the capture of Mordrambor.
